title: Legacy backlog batch 5 dispositioned
body: Closed claim cd5e85fb after processing legacy backlog batch 5 in place. Dispositions: 1 graduated, 1 duplicate, 1 owner-gated, 2 stale-withdrawn. Verification: markdownlint targeted pass and git diff --check pass; latest strict-hard remains SOFT with 20 soft, 22 healthy, 8 ready-empty, hard 0, critical 0. No archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
